name: @harness/observability
description: ISSUE-011 — the observability skeleton (Component 7, LOG + ALR.008): the append-only event_log write API (plain-English summary, redacted payload, cost_unknown≠0), the silent-failure detector (terminal task_queue ⋈ terminal event_log), the out-of-band log-write-failure path (stderr/file + log-write-failing health bit), cross-sink reconciliation (event_log ⋈ guardrail_log), retention + redaction-tombstone, and the independent alert-engine watchdog. Build-time logic proven with the house port+fake pattern + fault-injection (AF-118/119/120). The live pg adapter is authored to the ISSUE-008 0001 DDL, NOT run in this offline half.
